title: Poorvika Mobiles is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Poorvika Mobiles is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Floor Manager with drive and ambition, Poorvika Mobiles in Madurai is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Poorvika Mobiles:
Poorvika Mobiles is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Poorvika Mobiles!
